tips: Use /test to run the full test suite after changes
Use /build to compile for production (single binary)
Use /ci to run the local CI pipeline before pushing
Agents run in parallel — spawn multiple for independent crate work
storage-integrity-engineer audits merge safety and crash scenarios
test-engineer runs proactively after code changes — no need to ask
query-engine-architect handles FQL parser, planner, and execution
ipfix-ingestion-engine covers wire parsing through columnar flush
frontend-engineer handles React components, Vite config, and UX
The flowcus-query crate is the newest — FQL parser and AST live there
Set lengths in IPFIX always include the 4-byte header
Granule size is 8192 rows — marks and blooms index at this boundary
Part names encode generation, time range, and sequence number
CRC32-C checksums protect all binary formats on disk
